title: The Enchanted Archives
storySnippet: Deep within the enchanted archives, ancient spell-words guard secrets that only master spellers can unlock.

data.sentenceContext: The merchant fleet sailed across the Mediterranean Sea to trade with distant kingdoms.
Words like 'buzz' and 'hiss' are examples of onomatopoeia.
The court alchemist studied pharmaceutical remedies to heal the sick.
Every visitor to the fortress must complete a questionnaire before entering.
The spies arranged a secret rendezvous at midnight near the old bridge.
The elderly knight suffered from rheumatism in his joints after years of battle.
Stealing from the temple was considered a sacrilegious act by the villagers.
The new royal decree will supersede all previous laws on the matter.

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence with the correct word.

data.sentence: The fleet sailed across the ___ to reach the southern coast.
data.hint: A large sea between Europe and Africa

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence with the correct word.

data.hint: Words that imitate the sounds they describe

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence with the correct word.

data.sentence: Please fill out this ___ so we can learn more about your visit.
data.hint: A form with a set of questions

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence with the correct word.

data.sentence: The updated rules will ___ the older guidelines starting next week.
data.hint: To replace or take the place of something
